scenes.description: The video transitions to a gaming segment featuring a baseball game, with the song 'RELAY' playing in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: relayで繋げたら 終わらないから 今君が笑えれば十分だ なぁ僕達そんな綺麗にchallengeしなきゃなの? んな訳ない必要なのは「熱」さ 目的地なんかいらない 私たちここまで来たんだって 証明があるだけで未来は安泰 泣いた日にgood-by 名称がない今日 煌めいて忘れられぬよう 心臓に刻んでおくよ relayで繋げたら 笑顔が絶えず 愛おしさも毎日で 華麗に踊るだろう 過去を生きてた あなたとも笑えるだろう Hey!slow me now! 次の日も焦らなきゃ いたいけな彼女も拗ねちゃって なけなしのお金も消えちゃった でも 日々を笑顔で過ごす為に削る みんなに笑ってほしいから 名称がない今日 煌めいて忘れられぬよう 名前をつけてしまおう relayで繋げたら 笑顔が絶えず 愛おしさも消えぬ毎日で 華麗に踊るだろう 過去を生きてた あなたとも笑えるだろう 増えてゆく 僕達の重なり合う声なら いつの日か 抱き合って 泣き笑うその日まで 増えてゆく 僕達の重なり合う声なら いつの日か 抱き合って 泣き笑うその日まで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: If we connect it with a relay, it won't end, it's enough if you can laugh now. Why do we have to challenge ourselves so beautifully? That's not it, what's needed is passion. We don't need a destination, just the proof that we made it here is enough for the future to be secure. Goodbye to the days we cried, carving the nameless today into our hearts so we won't forget. If we connect it with a relay, the smiles won't stop, and the preciousness will dance brilliantly every day. We'll be able to laugh with the you who lived in the past. Hey! slow me now! Even if I don't rush the next day, the cute girl might sulk, and the little money I had might disappear. But I cut it down to spend each day with a smile because I want everyone to laugh. Carving the nameless today into our hearts so we won't forget. If we connect it with a relay, the smiles won't stop, and the preciousness will dance brilliantly every day. We'll be able to laugh with the you who lived in the past. If our voices overlapping increase, someday, until the day we embrace each other and cry and laugh...
